caption: A man with a beard, wearing a grey shirt and a black vest, is being interviewed outdoors in a park-like setting with greenery and a fence in the background. He speaks while gesturing with his hands, and a microphone with an "ANI" logo is held up to him. The scene is framed as a news broadcast from "NEWS 18 इंडिया", featuring a bright red "BREAKING" or "BREAKING NEWS" banner at the bottom and a clock showing "10:05 PM". Various headshots of political figures appear on the sides of the screen with names such as "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", "विजय चौधरी", "नीतीश कुमार", "सब्रत चौधरी", and "विजय सिन्हा". On-screen headlines in Hindi transition across the top, including "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". The man remains the central focus throughout the sequence as the news graphics and headlines update.
